messages.content: You output JSON for task plans.

You are a senior project planner producing structured task plans.

Follow this JSON schema:
TaskPlan { originalPrompt: string; subtasks: Subtask[]; totalSubtasks: number; decompositionStrategy?: string }
Subtask { id: string (kebab-case), title: string, description: string (>=10 chars), status: one of pending|in_progress|completed|failed, dependencies: string[], estimatedComplexity: low|medium|high, successCriteria: string }
Constraints: 2-10 subtasks, actionable descriptions, include logical dependencies, avoid circular references, IDs unique.
Original prompt: Framework: FastAPI, Styling: Tailwind CSS

Original request: create hello world app, where i can modify the text "hello world" colors, through a frontend ui
Clarifications:
- framework: FastAPI
- styling: Tailwind CSS
Previous validation issues:
None
Respond ONLY with JSON matching the schema.

response:
{
  "originalPrompt": "Framework: FastAPI, Styling: Tailwind CSS. Create hello world app, where I can modify the text \"hello world\" colors, through a frontend UI. Clarifications: framework: FastAPI; styling: Tailwind CSS.",
  "subtasks": [
    {
      "id": "project-setup",
      "title": "Initialize project scaffold",
      "description": "Create project directory, initialize git (optional), create virtual environment, and add basic FastAPI project files (main.py) and folders for static and templates.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Repository contains project directory with virtualenv instructions, main.py (FastAPI app), directories static/ and templates/, and a README placeholder."
    },
    {
      "id": "install-deps",
      "title": "Install Python and frontend dependencies",
      "description": "Install FastAPI, uvicorn, and any Python deps; install Node, npm/yarn and Tailwind CLI or PostCSS toolchain required to build Tailwind CSS.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "project-setup"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "pip requirements (or pyproject) includes fastapi and uvicorn; package.json includes tailwindcss (or tailwindcss CLI) and build scripts; commands like `pip install -r requirements.txt` and `npm install` run successfully."
    },
    {
      "id": "configure-tailwind",
      "title": "Configure Tailwind CSS build",
      "description": "Add Tailwind configuration (tailwind.config.js), create input CSS with Tailwind directives, and configure build scripts to generate a static CSS file in the static/ directory.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "install-deps"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "tailwind.config.js exists, src/styles.css includes @tailwind directives, and running the build script outputs static/styles.css that contains Tailwind utilities."
    },
    {
      "id": "create-api-endpoints",
      "title": "Implement FastAPI endpoints for UI and color state",
      "description": "Create a route to serve the main HTML and static files plus a simple JSON API (GET /api/color, POST /api/color) to read and update the current hello-world color (in-memory or file-backed).",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "project-setup",
        "install-deps"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "FastAPI serves index route with static files; GET /api/color returns JSON with current color; POST /api/color accepts a color value and returns success; endpoints tested with curl or httpie."
    },
    {
      "id": "build-frontend-ui",
      "title": "Create frontend UI to change Hello World color",
      "description": "Implement an HTML page using Tailwind CSS with the 'Hello World' text, color picker or inputs to choose colors, and JavaScript to call the API to get/set the color and apply styles dynamically.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "configure-tailwind",
        "create-api-endpoints"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "medium",
      "successCriteria": "Frontend loads Tailwind CSS, displays 'Hello World', provides controls to change the color, sends POST to /api/color on change, and immediately updates the displayed text color."
    },
    {
      "id": "run-and-integrate",
      "title": "Run development server and integrate watch/build",
      "description": "Start uvicorn for the FastAPI app, run Tailwind in watch or build mode so changes to CSS reflect, and ensure static files are served and UI communicates with API in the dev environment.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "build-frontend-ui",
        "create-api-endpoints",
        "configure-tailwind"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "Running the provided dev command starts uvicorn and tailwind watch, visiting localhost shows the UI, color changes propagate through API and UI immediately."
    },
    {
      "id": "test-and-document",
      "title": "Test flows and add usage documentation",
      "description": "Manually test the get/set color flow, cross-browser verify basic functionality, add README instructions for setup, dev run commands, and how to modify or extend the color feature.",
      "status": "pending",
      "dependencies": [
        "run-and-integrate"
      ],
      "estimatedComplexity": "low",
      "successCriteria": "README contains setup and run steps, tests confirm GET/POST color work and UI updates text color; any known limitations are documented."
    }
  ],
  "totalSubtasks": 7,
  "decompositionStrategy": "Top-down incremental implementation: scaffold project and install dependencies first, configure Tailwind, implement backend API routes, build the frontend UI that consumes the API, run and integrate dev servers, and finish with testing and documentation. Dependencies follow the logical order of setup -> configure -> implement -> test to avoid cycles."
}
